message:
docs(proposal): add post-feedback NATS integration memo

Add `PROPOSAL_TO_INTEGRATE_IDEAS_FROM_NATS_INTO_ASUPERSYNC__AFTER_FEEDBACK.md`
as a separate feedback-integrated proposal instead of overwriting the existing
memo.

The new document folds in the follow-up architectural feedback around:
- a compiler-centered FabricIR and emitted runtime artifacts
- packet, authority, and reasoning plane separation
- static capability tokens beneath `Cx` and session-typed protocol contracts
- service classes, ack taxonomy, privacy-budgeted metadata, and quantitative obligations
- CRDT-backed non-authoritative control surfaces, threat modeling, and progressive disclosure
- an expanded phased plan, beachhead product framing, and a tighter recommendation

It also includes a manual de-slopify prose pass so the feedback copy reads more
directly and less formulaically without changing the technical substance.
